test-method.name: testPath1_InvalidWeight
test-method.description: Path 1: Trong luong khong hop le

test-method.name: testPath8_NoiThanhMember
test-method.description: Path 8: Noi thanh, member duoc giam 10 phan tram

test-method.name: testMCDC_DiemTinDungDocLap_Tu700TroLen
test-method.description: MC/DC cho D: diem tin dung >= 700 lam thay doi ket qua

test-method.name: testMCDC_TaiSanDocLap_KhongCoTaiSan
test-method.description: MC/DC cho C: khong co tai san bao lanh va diem tin dung thap

test-method.name: testMCDC_ThuNhapDocLap_ThapHon10Trieu
test-method.description: MC/DC cho B: thu nhap < 10 trieu lam thay doi ket qua

test-method.name: testMCDC_TuoiDocLap_Du22TroLen
test-method.description: MC/DC cho A: tuoi >= 22, truong hop co du dieu kien vay

test-method.name: testMCDC_TuoiDocLap_ThapHon22
test-method.description: MC/DC cho A: tuoi < 22 lam thay doi ket qua

test-method.name: testLoginFormDisplayed
test-method.description: Kiem thu form dang nhap hien thi

test-method.name: testTitle
test-method.description: Kiem thu tieu de trang chu

test-method.name: testBoundary_Plus84WithSpaces
test-method.description: Boundary: +84 co khoang trang hop le

test-method.name: testPath2_InvalidCharacter
test-method.description: Path 2: chua ky tu khong hop le

test-method.name: testPath3_InvalidPrefix
test-method.description: Path 3: khong bat dau bang 0 hoac +84

test-method.name: testPath5_InvalidLength
test-method.description: Path 5: do dai sau chuan hoa khong bang 10

test-method.name: testPath4_ValidPlus84
test-method.description: Path 4: bat dau bang +84 va hop le

test-method.name: testPath6_ValidWithSpaces
test-method.description: Path 6: co khoang trang hop le
